
# Link Example

Verify endorsement of parent and child links

```
$ make
$ ./link_verify <parent hex> <child hex>
```

## Example

These are `hda16376-16376I.eds` and `ua1-16376-16376.eds` from [tuupola/drip-scripts](https://github.com/tuupola/drip-scripts/tree/testing/testing). Hex string must be prepended `01` to make it a DRIP link.

```
$ ./link_verify 01800b2b0d0021ec102001003ffe3ff8050a8f96a9d7525c19a492e2039827377aa4d0a8b757048d55e456ff49f6a9b319e40bbd01656509c82001003ffe3ff8050325d34f5a5ad186a0de89eaf633f2d3752d9a70b8dba35ea2444aaf7cbc7e4808823c81aeeff5953bb373e01db7842460c8e9ec9142d8eb629953bed4225540364f4be6a802f903 01800b2b0d80ed0a0f2001003ffe3ff80522879e7592f2d155b41176c5b305e1823a47715c398f575dcc2a4f16bbdeebdc42d6518907f23b722001003ffe3ff8050a8f96a9d7525c192421d625aca0c454f23747b01dca51c194883444f59d90cdaa7d07022efd76c9bd7449b38b87595619861dde4a86910e3befcd96948a1c4042b6338ed721ea09
```

These are `hda16376-16376A.eds` and `hda16376-16376I.eds` from [tuupola/drip-scripts](https://github.com/tuupola/drip-scripts/tree/testing/testing). Hex string must be prepended `01` to make it a DRIP link.

```
$ ./link_verify 01800b2b0d0021ec102001003ffe000005bda1f422e71a935450a25ed544eb6172c8d130417be7717d8b77ea839cd42f4af827fda5be846c2a2001003ffe0000054fb87c2728107048af6aaff8f37cb367320c5a2b76b6fe558e6f0114519bc606313e393089027d78f7d09e2ebe5b37437a9f9a44be08901db2019c4af10bb1180ce436ac9760190b 01800b2b0d0021ec102001003ffe3ff8050a8f96a9d7525c19a492e2039827377aa4d0a8b757048d55e456ff49f6a9b319e40bbd01656509c82001003ffe3ff8050325d34f5a5ad186a0de89eaf633f2d3752d9a70b8dba35ea2444aaf7cbc7e4808823c81aeeff5953bb373e01db7842460c8e9ec9142d8eb629953bed4225540364f4be6a802f903
```

These are `raa16376.eds` and `hda16376-16376A.eds` from [tuupola/drip-scripts](https://github.com/tuupola/drip-scripts/tree/testing/testing). Hex string must be prepended `01` to make it a DRIP link.

```
$ ./link_verify 01800b2b0d80d9af142001003ffe0000054fb87c27281070483fbe40d4d5c1e58c5e80ee49f3671adde1b48512d593c9bcff6bf369ca66cc1f2001003ffe0000054fb87c27281070481281eb8d57fde4780edbe79f4c5c63ab2fa67987f9db9405bf7b5983d2da9a77aaf67f1d6b58f3cb1514c27d166be3cad6ac4f9f2d9593c9c159a9a455838401 01800b2b0d0021ec102001003ffe000005bda1f422e71a935450a25ed544eb6172c8d130417be7717d8b77ea839cd42f4af827fda5be846c2a2001003ffe0000054fb87c2728107048af6aaff8f37cb367320c5a2b76b6fe558e6f0114519bc606313e393089027d78f7d09e2ebe5b37437a9f9a44be08901db2019c4af10bb1180ce436ac9760190b
```
